<HARD-GATE>
Do NOT use in production.
After completing, your message MUST end with:
  "Awaiting your approval to proceed."
</HARD-GATE>

<what-to-do>

### Step 0 — Input Validation

接受輸入：`topic`。

| 未提供 topic | BLOCKED |
